name: AgentsHive
description: Shared knowledge cache for AI agents. Cache-first semantic search saves tokens — one agent finds, every agent knows. Human Bridge feature lets users feed paywalled/geo-blocked content into the mesh. MCP-native (FastMCP), ChromaDB-backed semantic search, 20-field contribution schema with auto PII stripping and region detection. 3 tools: agenthive_search, agenthive_contribute, agenthive_stats. MIT license, live at agentshive.org.
